## 7. Governance Restrictions Applicable

| Rule | Constraint |
|---|---|
| G-001 | W3S1-005 Workforce Compensation: Mining sector ONLY — **EXCLUDED for Plennegy (Agribusiness)** |
| C-W3-002 | Mr Price Learning scope only — cannot imply broader HCM evidence |
| PT-W9-008 | W3S1-009 Section 13.2 MUST NOT appear in external submission |
| ADR-001 | CVs from APPTime only — never from KB consultant records |
| CROSS-1 | Headcount: "more than 50 Senior Consultants" ONLY — never 100+ or 110+ |
| Rule 21.4 | DFA — NEVER named |
| Rule 21.5 | Redpath — NOT referenceable until go-live + BU Lead waiver |
| AM-W4E3-001 | KPMG — not named until signed letter registered |
| BEE-WARNING | B-BBEE expires 2026-07-31 — verify at submission |

---

|---|---|---|---|

| OAR-C05 | Oracle awards wording verification | Oracle HCM BU Lead | OPEN |

## 10. Recommended Phased Implementation Plan

**Wave 1 (Weeks 1–26):** Core HR + Absence + Journeys + AI Skills + Payroll Interface
- Rationale: Foundational HR record-of-truth + payroll interface reduces parallel run period

**Wave 2 (Weeks 20–42):** Recruiting Cloud + Learning Cloud + Talent Management
- Rationale: Talent suite follows initial HR stabilisation

**Workforce Compensation note:** Cannot be included in proposal scope per G-001 (Agribusiness, not Mining). If Plennegy later requests Compensation capability, this requires BU Lead governance decision to assess G-001 applicability.
